title: Notifications for task assignments from others ONLY

posts.author: IsaMay (Isa)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve setup an automation for when an item is being created, it automatically chooses the person who created it and makes it the item’s owner.
So, when I create a task for myself, I obviously don’t need to get a notification for it. However, I’d like to receive a notification if somebody else creates an item and then assigns the task to me. Is it possible to differentiate those two? Right now I can either have all or none.
Thanks
